channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Rules eased for banks to give incentive bonuses to staff

Importance: 104.5 | Covered by: 10 feeds | Reputation: 9.0

Matched titles:
- BB eases incentive bonus rules for bank staff
- Banks allowed to give incentive bonus without net profit
- Central bank allows banks to grant incentive bonuses for special achievements
- Bangladesh Bank eases incentive bonus curbs

- Bankers’ performance-based bonus rules eased
- BB eases restrictions on banks’ profit sharing
- Central bank allows banks to grant incentive bonuses for special achievements
- Central bank allows banks to grant incentive bonuses for special achievements
- BB permits banks to offer incentive bonuses for special achievements
- BB allows one-month incentive bonus for banks with special achievements
